rationale: No existing spec tests the FTS default-column feature directly. The four specs modified in the diff (logspage, logstable, logsquickmode, indexquery) only relax their existing assertions to tolerate the new default column — they do not verify the feature's core behaviors: auto-selection on search, system-pick vs user-pick semantics, SQL-mode bypass, stream-change clearing, persistence prevention, re-resolution. A dedicated spec is warranted. All behaviors are WIRED per the feature doc's reachability table — no fixme placeholders needed.
